title: Idempotent order creation versus business deduplication

difficulty.rationale: Requires modeling two independent conflict mechanisms over the same create endpoint, returning the correct distinct 409 reason for each, while keeping idempotency-key replay precedence ahead of business uniqueness.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /orders with a new key and unused reference creates an order and returns 201.
A replay with the same key and body returns the original response with the Idempotency-Replayed header.
The same key with a different body returns 409 idempotency_key_reuse.
A different key reusing an existing reference returns 409 duplicate_reference.
must_not: Return duplicate_reference when the same key is retried with the same body.
Return idempotency_key_reuse when a fresh key collides with an existing reference.
Create a second order when a conflict is returned.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
